sections.paragraph:
- Original: μήτι

- Transliteration: meti

- Phonetic: may'-tee

- Definition:

1. whether, at all, perchance

- Origin: from G3361 and the neuter of G5100

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From G3361 and the neuter of G5100; whether at all: - not [the particle usually not expressed except by the form of the question].
